commands.author: maweibin

target.title: fix(agents): allow empty-error-retry when replayMetadata is absent (#97877)
target.body:
Fixes #97877.

## What Problem This Solves

`replayMetadata.hadPotentialSideEffects` is accumulated across attempts via `observeReplayMetadata`. When a session executes tools on Turn 1 and then hits a transient provider 5xx on Turn 2 (before any tool execution in the current attempt), the cumulative flag is already `true` from Turn 1 ŌĆö incorrectly blocking the empty-error-retry path even though the failed model call itself never ran tools.

## Why This Change Was Made

Four changes to separate current-attempt side effects from cumulative session history:

1. **EmbeddedRunAttemptResult** (types.ts): Added optional `currentAttemptReplayMetadata` ŌĆö records side effects from the current attempt only.

2. **normalizeEmbeddedRunAttemptResult** (run.ts): Computes `currentAttemptReplayMetadata` from per-attempt raw fields via `buildAttemptReplayMetadata` ŌĆö the same function `attempt.ts` uses to compute `observedReplayMetadata`. This avoids using `raw.replayMetadata` which is already cumulative (attempt.ts merges with accumulated session state before returning). The cumulative `replayMetadata` field stays required and uses `resolveAttemptReplayMetadata(raw)` as before ŌĆö no contract weakening.

3. **shouldRetrySilentErrorAssistantTurn** (incomplete-turn.ts): Prefers `currentAttemptReplayMetadata` to decide whether this specific model call had side effects. Falls back to cumulative `replayMetadata` for harnesses that do not yet populate the new field (backward compatible).

4. **Runner proof + regression tests**: Added `mockedLog.warn` assertions proving `[empty-error-retry]` fires in the real `runEmbeddedAgent` runner path, and new focused tests covering all metadata states.

## User Impact

Agents recover from transient 5xx provider errors on any turn ŌĆö even after prior turns executed tools. The documented `[empty-error-retry]` retry of up to 3 attempts fires when the failed model call itself produced no content, no tool calls, and no delivery side effects.

## Evidence

**Behavior addressed**: Cumulative `replayMetadata.hadPotentialSideEffects` from prior turns blocks retry of a transient 5xx on a later turn where the model failed before tool execution.

**Real environment tested**: Node 22.19+, local OpenClaw checkout. Real `runEmbeddedAgent` runner path exercised through the overflow-compaction harness ŌĆö `normalizeEmbeddedRunAttemptResult` (with the fix), `shouldRetrySilentErrorAssistantTurn`, and the retry loop all run as in production.

**Exact steps or command run after this patch**:

```
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run.empty-error-retry.test.ts --run
```

**Evidence after fix**:

The runner test harness exercises the full `runEmbeddedAgent` ŌåÆ `normalizeEmbeddedRunAttemptResult` ŌåÆ `shouldRetrySilentErrorAssistantTurn` ŌåÆ retry loop. Log output is captured via `mockedLog.warn`:

```
// Basic retry: mockedLog.warn called with "[empty-error-retry]"
Ō£ō retries when a turn ends with stopReason=error and zero output tokens
  ŌåÆ expect(mockedLog.warn).toHaveBeenCalledWith(
      expect.stringContaining("[empty-error-retry]")
    )

// Regression #97877: prior-turn tools + clean 5xx ŌåÆ retry allowed + log fires
Ō£ō retries when prior turns had side effects but current 5xx attempt ran no tools
  ŌåÆ expect(mockedLog.warn).toHaveBeenCalledWith(
      expect.stringContaining("[empty-error-retry]")
    )

// Side effects in current attempt ŌåÆ NO retry + NO log
Ō£ō does not retry when the failed attempt recorded side effects
  ŌåÆ expect(mockedLog.warn).not.toHaveBeenCalledWith(
      expect.stringContaining("[empty-error-retry]")
    )
```

Behavior proof (5 scenarios via `buildAttemptReplayMetadata`):

```
[1] currentAttempt clean + cumulative dirty (PRIOR TOOLS) ŌåÆ retry YES
[2] currentAttempt dirty + cumulative dirty (TOOLS RAN) ŌåÆ retry NO
[3] LEGACY (no currentAttempt), cumulative dirty ŌåÆ retry NO
[4] No metadata at all (5xx before tool subsystem) ŌåÆ retry YES
[5] Both clean (clean session) ŌåÆ retry YES
```

```
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run.empty-error-retry.test.ts --run
```

```
 Test Files  1 passed (1)
      Tests  23 passed (23)
```

```
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run.incomplete-turn.test.ts --run
```

```
 Test Files  1 passed (1)
      Tests  114 passed (114)
```

```
node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/incomplete-turn.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/types.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run.empty-error-retry.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run.incomplete-turn.test.ts
```

```
(passed, exit 0)
```

**Observed result after fix**: The real `runEmbeddedAgent` runner produces `[empty-error-retry]` log messages when retrying. The log fires only for per-attempt-clean 5xx errors ŌĆö not when the failed turn had tool side effects. Legacy harnesses without `currentAttemptReplayMetadata` keep the previous conservative behavior via fallback to cumulative `replayMetadata`.

**What was not tested**: Live E2E with a real provider returning raw HTML 502. The fix is verified through the full `runEmbeddedAgent` runner path (not just function-level calls), with real `normalizeEmbeddedRunAttemptResult` + `buildAttemptReplayMetadata` processing, the real retry loop, and 137 total tests confirming the `[empty-error-retry]` log fires correctly.

## Regression Test Plan

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run.empty-error-retry.test.ts --run` ŌĆö 23 passed (includes runner log verification)
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run.incomplete-turn.test.ts --run` ŌĆö 114 passed (includes currentAttemptReplayMetadata unit tests)
- `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs` on all changed files ŌĆö exit 0
- `pnpm build` ŌĆö exit 0

## Root Cause

In `attempt.ts`, `replayMetadataFromState(observeReplayMetadata(getReplayState(), observedReplayMetadata))` merges per-attempt `observedReplayMetadata` with accumulated session-level `getReplayState()` before returning. The resulting `rawAttempt.replayMetadata` is always cumulative ŌĆö `hadPotentialSideEffects` carries the OR of all prior turns.

Previously, `normalizeEmbeddedRunAttemptResult` saved `raw.replayMetadata` as `currentAttemptReplayMetadata`, making both fields carry the same cumulative value ŌĆö the per-attempt check was a no-op. The fix re-derives per-attempt metadata from the raw attempt's observable fields (toolMetas, messaging delivery evidence, session spawns, cron adds) using `buildAttemptReplayMetadata` ŌĆö the same function `attempt.ts` uses to compute `observedReplayMetadata` before accumulation.

## AI Assistance

- **AI-assisted**: Yes
- **Model used**: Claude Opus 4.8 (1M context)
- **Co-Authored-By**: Already in commit message
